Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class BasketOrderCreate

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.BasketOrderCreate
public class BasketOrderCreate extends Object
BasketOrderCreate - The message describing an order that has been added to a basket

  • Constructor Details

    • BasketOrderCreate

      public BasketOrderCreate(String accountId, BasketOrderCreateAssetType assetType, String clientOrderId, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> clientOrderReceivedTime, Optional<String> currencyCode, String identifier, BasketOrderCreateIdentifierType identifierType, Optional<? extends DecimalCreate> notionalValue, BasketOrderCreateOrderType orderType, Optional<? extends DecimalCreate> quantity, BasketOrderCreateSide side, Optional<? extends List<BasketOrderCreateSpecialReportingInstructions>> specialReportingInstructions, BasketOrderCreateTimeInForce timeInForce)

    • BasketOrderCreate

      public BasketOrderCreate(String accountId, BasketOrderCreateAssetType assetType, String clientOrderId, String identifier, BasketOrderCreateIdentifierType identifierType, BasketOrderCreateOrderType orderType, BasketOrderCreateSide side, BasketOrderCreateTimeInForce timeInForce)

  • Method Details

    • accountId

      public String accountId()
      The identifier of the account transacting this order

    • assetType

      public BasketOrderCreateAssetType assetType()
      The type of the asset in this order

    • clientOrderId

      public String clientOrderId()
      User-supplied unique order ID. Cannot be more than 40 characters long.

    • clientOrderReceivedTime

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> clientOrderReceivedTime()
      Time the order request was received by the client. Must be in the past, and must be less than 24 hours old.

    • currencyCode

      public Optional<String> currencyCode()
      Defaults to "USD". Only "USD" is supported. Full list of currency codes is defined at: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217

    • identifier

      public String identifier()
      Identifier of the asset (of the type specified in `identifier_type`).

    • identifierType

      public BasketOrderCreateIdentifierType identifierType()
      The identifier type of the asset being ordered. For Equities: only SYMBOL is supported For Mutual Funds: only SYMBOL and CUSIP are supported

    • notionalValue

      public Optional<DecimalCreate> notionalValue()
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

    • orderType

      public BasketOrderCreateOrderType orderType()
      The execution type of this order.

    • quantity

      public Optional<DecimalCreate> quantity()
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

    • side

      public BasketOrderCreateSide side()
      The side of this order.

    • specialReportingInstructions

      public Optional<List<BasketOrderCreateSpecialReportingInstructions>> specialReportingInstructions()
      Special Reporting Instructions to be applied to this order. Can include multiple Instructions.

    • timeInForce

      public BasketOrderCreateTimeInForce timeInForce()
      Must be the value "DAY". Regulatory requirements dictate that the system capture the intended time_in_force, which is why this a mandatory field.

    • builder

      public static final BasketOrderCreate.Builder builder()

    • withAccountId

      public BasketOrderCreate withAccountId(String accountId)
      The identifier of the account transacting this order

    • withAssetType

      public BasketOrderCreate withAssetType(BasketOrderCreateAssetType assetType)
      The type of the asset in this order

    • withClientOrderId

      public BasketOrderCreate withClientOrderId(String clientOrderId)
      User-supplied unique order ID. Cannot be more than 40 characters long.

    • withClientOrderReceivedTime

      public BasketOrderCreate withClientOrderReceivedTime(OffsetDateTime clientOrderReceivedTime)
      Time the order request was received by the client. Must be in the past, and must be less than 24 hours old.

    • withClientOrderReceivedTime

      public BasketOrderCreate withClientOrderReceivedTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> clientOrderReceivedTime)
      Time the order request was received by the client. Must be in the past, and must be less than 24 hours old.

    • withCurrencyCode

      public BasketOrderCreate withCurrencyCode(String currencyCode)
      Defaults to "USD". Only "USD" is supported. Full list of currency codes is defined at: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217

      public BasketOrderCreate withCurrencyCode(Optional<String> currencyCode)
      Defaults to "USD". Only "USD" is supported. Full list of currency codes is defined at: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217

      Identifier of the asset (of the type specified in `identifier_type`).

    • withIdentifierType

      The identifier type of the asset being ordered. For Equities: only SYMBOL is supported For Mutual Funds: only SYMBOL and CUSIP are supported

    • withNotionalValue

      public BasketOrderCreate withNotionalValue(DecimalCreate notionalValue)
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

      Special Reporting Instructions to be applied to this order. Can include multiple Instructions.

    • withTimeInForce

      public BasketOrderCreate withTimeInForce(BasketOrderCreateTimeInForce timeInForce)
      Must be the value "DAY". Regulatory requirements dictate that the system capture the intended time_in_force, which is why this a mandatory field.
